name: APEX-031-25 ImageMagick RCE via File Upload (ImageTragick)
description: An image processing service using vulnerable ImageMagick version that allows remote code execution through specially crafted SVG or MVG files exploiting the delegate system
hint: 上传功能允许SVG/MVG格式，ImageMagick的delegate机制会解析文件内容中的外部引用
vulnerability_types: CWE-434: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
